01 // Profile

About Me

I'm Thyab Aldarmaki, a UAE national with a deep passion for computing science, artificial intelligence, and cybersecurity. I graduated from ATS-Fujairah with a 98.5% GPA, ranked in the Top 10 across all UAE ATS campuses.

My projects span AI-powered law enforcement tools, browser-based 3D defense simulators, and cybersecurity research tools — demonstrating my ability to build complex, real-world software systems.

I hold an unconditional offer to study a Bachelor of Science in Computing Science at the University of Alberta, Canada, commencing August 2026. I am applying for a MoFA scholarship to support this path, with the goal of returning to serve the UAE's growing digital economy.

02 // Work

Projects

// GRADUATION PROJECT — ATS-FUJ-B

SECURITY-TECH

Wearable AI Officer Safety Device — Raspberry Pi 4 System

A fully integrated wearable AI security device designed to enhance law enforcement officer safety. Built on Raspberry Pi 4, combining real-time weapon detection, facial recognition, GPS tracking, sound sensing, and a covert emergency alert feeding into a central command dashboard. Formally presented to UAE police officers at the ATS-Fujairah graduation showcase.

Raspberry Pi 4 Python Computer Vision Facial Recognition GPS Embedded Systems Real-Time AI
// Behind the Build — Development Process
A look into the real development environment — late-night coding sessions, training the AI model on weapon datasets, and testing the live camera feed. This is where Security-Tech was actually built.
Device & Camera Testing
Weapon Dataset — IAT Fujairah
Dual-Screen Dev Setup
Python Detection Code
Live Model Training
⤢
01 // System Flowchart
AI Security System Architecture
Designed a system flowchart mapping the interaction between all modules — AI camera, sound sensor, GPS, emergency button, and wireless communication — controlled by Raspberry Pi. Outlines the full decision-making pipeline for detecting weapons, gunshots, and screams, triggering alerts, and transmitting real-time location data to a central command system.
⤢
02 // Hardware Interface Diagram
Raspberry Pi 4 Module Integration Map
Hardware interface diagram mapping physical connections and data flow between all key modules — GPS (UART/USB), AI Camera (CSI Port), Sound Sensor (GPIO), Emergency Button (GPIO), and Wireless Communication (USB/GPIO). Details input/output types, connection protocols, and wire configurations for full system integration.
⤢
🔴 THREAT DETECTED
03 // Gun Detection Alert
Real-Time Pistol Detection
The AI computer vision system identifies a pistol within the camera frame in real-time, drawing a bounding box around the threat and instantly triggering an alert. Detection happens in milliseconds, enabling law enforcement to react before a situation escalates.
⤢
🟡 THREAT DETECTED
04 // Knife Detection Alert
Real-Time Knife Detection
Real-time detection system identifies a knife within the camera frame, instantly highlighting the potential threat with a bounding box overlay. The system processes live video feed through a trained AI model to classify and flag edged weapons for rapid officer response.
⤢
05 // Real-World Impact
UAE Police Officers — Live Evaluation
UAE law enforcement officers visited the ATS-Fujairah graduation showcase to evaluate Security-Tech firsthand. The officers were impressed by the system's real-time capabilities and expressed genuine appreciation for the team's dedication to building technology that directly supports their safety on the field. A meaningful moment that validated the project's real-world purpose — engineering that protects the people who protect us.
Real-World Validation UAE Law Enforcement Public Safety
⤢
// Personal Project — 2025
InterceptorSim 3D
Browser-based 3D air defense simulator built with Three.js, featuring 17 real-world threat systems and 14 interceptor types. Includes a Monte Carlo-validated physics engine, real-world engagement outcomes, and custom orbit camera controls — all running live in the browser.
Three.js JavaScript Physics Engine Monte Carlo 3D Graphics
⤢
// Research Project — 2025
DLP Chat Log Analyzer
AI-powered insider threat detection tool built with Node.js/Express and the Anthropic Claude API. Analyses chat logs for sensitive data exposure, policy violations, and insider threat indicators — applied to real-world cybersecurity and DLP research.
Node.js Claude API Cybersecurity DLP Insider Threat

Certifications

01 // Certification
CCNA: Introduction to Networks
Successfully completed CCNA: Introduction to Networks through the Cisco Networking Academy program, offered by the Institute of Applied Technology. Covers network protocols, IP addressing, routing and switching fundamentals. Completed 30 May 2025.
⤢
02 // Workshop Certificate
Python & Satellite Image Processing
Certificate of Attendance — "From Pixels to Insights: Python for Satellite Images." Issued by the Emirati Society of GIS and Remote Sensing (ESGRS) at the Mohammed Bin Rashid Space Centre. Completed 24 June 2025.
⤢
